events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Legendary Queen guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Brian May Birthday
angles.copy: The legendary Queen guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May turns 79 today. Still rocking stages worldwide, his iconic Red Special guitar sound is unmistakable.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday
angles.copy: Still strutting his stuff at 83, the incomparable Mick Jagger celebrates his birthday today. A true rock and roll titan, his energy remains unmatched.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: MTV launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first music video.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: On this day in 1981, MTV burst onto screens, forever changing music. Its first video? The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' – an ironic start to a visual revolution.

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, which became the fastest-selling debut album in British history.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Thirty-two years ago today, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. The album that launched a Britpop phenomenon and defined a generation. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival turns 57
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a three-day festival of peace and music, began on August 15, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, the legendary Woodstock festival kicked off. Three days of peace, love, and music that became a cultural touchstone.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Remembering Elvis Presley, the King of Rock and Roll, who passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Elvis Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977. His music and legend live on.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album on September 26, 1969, featuring classic tracks and that famous zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. From 'Come Together' to 'Here Comes the Sun', it's an absolute masterpiece. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: American-British singer-songwriter Chrissie Hynde, frontwoman of The Pretenders, was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the formidable Chrissie Hynde! The Pretenders frontwoman, still a rock icon, continues to inspire.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: English singer-songwriter Liam Gallagher, known as the frontman of Oasis and for his solo career, was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: The one and only Liam Gallagher turns 54 today. From Oasis anthems to his solo swagger, the voice of a generation is still going strong. As you were!

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon released his timeless anthem 'Imagine' on October 11, 1971, which became a global message of peace and unity.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-five years ago, John Lennon gave the world 'Imagine'. A powerful call for peace that resonates just as strongly today.

events.title: The first iPod turns 25
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how people listened to music.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? Twenty-five years ago today, Apple dropped a game-changer, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket' and redefining music on the go.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the iconic British secret agent and the release of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 007 and all the iconic theme tunes that have accompanied his thrilling adventures. What's your favourite Bond song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Lennon, co-founder of The Beatles and an iconic solo artist, was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: John Lennon Birthday
angles.copy: Remembering the legendary John Lennon, who would have been 86 today. A true visionary whose music continues to inspire generations.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: English actor, comedian, and screenwriter John Cleese was born on October 27, 1939.

angles.name: John Cleese Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the comedy legend, John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, his genius is undeniable.
